message:
docs: redesign TUI architecture diagram with elegant pastels

Replace the class diagram with a modern flowchart showing the complete
Bubble Tea architecture with soft, unobtrusive pastel colors:

- Warm cream (#fef3e2) for Elm Architecture core (Model/Update/View)
- Soft blue (#e8f4f8) for input layer (keyboard, resize, mouse)
- Light lavender (#f0e6f6) for analysis engine and graph metrics
- Sage green (#e6f3e6) for view components (List/Board/Graph/Insights)
- Soft pink (#fce4ec) for adaptive layout (Mobile/Split/UltraWide)
- Warm accent (#fff8e1) for terminal output

Visual improvements:
- Shows complete data flow from input to rendered output
- Demonstrates the Elm Architecture cycle clearly
- Links color-matched to their source components
- Emojis and italic subtext for visual hierarchy
- Professional appearance suitable for documentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -372,55 +372,78 @@ The output is designed to be strictly typed and easily parseable by tools like ` `bv` is built with the **Bubble Tea** framework, ensuring a glitch-free, 60fps experience. It features an adaptive layout engine that responds to terminal resize events and a custom ASCII/Unicode graph renderer. ```mermaid -classDiagram - %% Soft Pastel Theme — Refined - classDef model fill:#fff8e1,stroke:#ffcc80,stroke-width:2px,color:#e65100 - classDef view fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#ce93d8,stroke-width:2px,color:#6a1b9a - classDef logic fill:#e0f2f1,stroke:#80cbc4,stroke-width:2px,color:#00695c - classDef data fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#90caf9,stroke-width:2px,color:#1565c0 - - class Model:::model { - +issues []Issue - +stats GraphStats - +insights Insights - +Update(msg) Model - +View() string - } +flowchart TB + %% ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ + %% Elegant Pastel Theme — Soft, Modern, Professional + %% ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ + + classDef elmCore fill:#fef3e2,stroke:#f5d0a9,stroke-width:2px,color:#8b5a2b + classDef input fill:#e8f4f8,stroke:#b8d4e3,stroke-width:2px,color:#2c5f7c + classDef analysis fill:#f0e6f6,stroke:#d4b8e0,stroke-width:2px,color:#5d3a6b + classDef views fill:#e6f3e6,stroke:#b8d9b8,stroke-width:2px,color:#2d5a2d + classDef render fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#f8bbd9,stroke-width:2px,color:#7b3547 + classDef accent fill:#fff8e1,stroke:#ffe082,stroke-width:2px,color:#8d6e00 + + subgraph elm [" 🫖 Elm Architecture "] + direction TB + M["Model
